falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 2% and maintains that level for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout contradicting the current HOLD signal and historical bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average true range (ATR) increases by 50% compared to the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility exceeding historical thresholds would invalidate the blowoff score and suggest a market reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Non-Farm Payrolls report exceeds 250k jobs added with unemployment rate dropping below 3.5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This macroeconomic data would create immediate bullish pressure invalidating the current market pattern and HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
